name: Photoroom API
what_it_does: AI photo editing API combining background removal, background replacement, shadow generation, and product photo enhancement — focused on e-commerce and business use cases.
use_cases: E-commerce product photo standardization and background replacement
Batch image processing for online marketplaces
not_for: Non-product image use cases without custom background needs
best_when: E-commerce platforms or marketplaces needing automated product photo background replacement with brand-consistent backgrounds.
avoid_when: Simple background removal without replacement is all you need (remove-bg-api is cheaper), or budget is very tight.

auth.notes: API key in x-api-key header. Tiered plans with different feature access. No scope granularity within a tier.

pricing.notes: Subscription or pay-per-use. Enterprise tier includes SLA and dedicated support. Pricing less transparent than competitors.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Reasonable HTTP status codes. Error messages are functional but terse. Limited troubleshooting documentation for edge cases.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Deterministic for same input image and parameters; safe to retry
known_agent_gotchas: Credit card required to start (no truly free tier for API)
Background replacement options vary by plan tier — agents must handle feature unavailability gracefully
No SDK available — agents must handle multipart/form-data encoding
Rate limits not clearly documented; may need empirical testing
Pricing structure less transparent than remove-bg-api competitors

security_score_components.security_notes: Simple API key with no scope granularity. EU data residency available (GDPR compliant). Single key controls all account operations. No webhook signatures needed. Credit card requirement increases account value to protect.
